# Patient Family Resource — Content

Public content mirror for the MGBfC Patient Family Resource App.

## Do not edit directly

**This repository is regenerated by an internal content pipeline.** Manual commits to `assets/` will be overwritten on the next publish. All content changes are made through the internal content management system, not here.

## Public-readability notice

This repository is **world-readable on GitHub**. Anything committed here — content text, PDFs, images, contact entries, commit history — is permanently visible to the public internet. Before publishing, content must not contain:

- Patient-identifying information (names, room numbers, MRNs, identifying scenarios)
- Internal-only phone numbers, pager extensions, or staff contact details not intended for caregivers
- Internal infrastructure, system, or process details
- Anything else not appropriate for public viewing

Content review is the editor's responsibility before each publish.

## What's here

- `assets/content/` — JSON files consumed by the mobile app
- `assets/pdfs/` — PDF documents referenced by content
- `assets/images/resources/` — images referenced by content

## Making changes

Content edits go through the internal content management system. Contact the project maintainer for access.
